ValidationRule.description: MQ-1216 Prevent Legal requests from updating quotes that were sent to Zuora
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Legal_Services", NOT(ISNULL(Quote__c)), OR( ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Sent To Zuora"), ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Quote Pending Renewal Date"), ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Contract Signed"), ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Contract Signed Manually"), ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Cancelled"), ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Ready for Billing"), ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Processed Directly in Zuora"), ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c, "Voided") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Legal request is related to a locked quote, please submit/ complete the request without a related quote
